name: YanTai Yuancheng Gold Co., Ltd.
summary: YanTai Yuancheng Gold Co., Ltd. primarily engages in real estate development and property management activities in China. The company specializes on the reconstruction of old town; and development of residential communities in the urban district in Yantai in Shandong province. It also engages in the wholesale and retail of commodities. The company was formerly known as YanTai Yuancheng Enterprise Group Co., Ltd. YanTai Yuancheng Gold Co., Ltd. is based in Yantai, China.
